description: A portrait-format photo collage. Across the top, white text reads Just a few of the 5000 annual victims of illegal aliens. All were permanently separated from their families. Below the text is a dense grid of dozens of small individual portrait photographs of different people of varying ages, with several larger portraits placed at the corners and edges. There is no seal.
notable_text: Just a few of the 5000 annual victims of illegal aliens. All were permanently separated from their families
